summary: TWO_COLUMN for X~Exp(λ=1.5): left axes show the always_redraw integrand λ·e^((t-λ)x) with shaded area, plus the reference pdf λ·e^(-λx). ValueTracker t sweeps -1.0 → 1.45 (just below λ); right column has live t, M(t)=λ/(λ-t), the moment expansion, and a mini M(t) plot with vertical asymptote at t=λ.
